title: Project Pane Git v2
problem_frame: Project Pane Git v2 needs a concrete implementation plan grounded in input/source-plan.md and input/repo-context.md. The plan must explain the case-specific project pane, git, branch, status behavior, separate scope from non-goals, name repo-relative implementation and test paths, and preserve the source document's product constraints instead of summarizing it.
decisions: Prefer repo-local project paths because the plan must be portable.
Separate UI and state work so that tests can isolate behavior.
Avoid stale absolute paths because the plan must work across worktrees.

implementation_units.name: integration unit
implementation_units.work: Connect the feature into the app shell.
